name: flowmap
description: A spatial diagram tool for dev work — drag-and-drop flowcharts with two-way Mermaid sync, themes, and exports.

scripts.flowmap:exports: node tools/flowmap/exports-coverage.mjs --map docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd --tsconfig tsconfig.json --src src --allow docs/flowmap/curation-allowlist.txt
scripts.flowmap:gate: node tools/buildspec/extract.mjs --map docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd --tsconfig tsconfig.json --out /tmp/flowmap-extracted.mmd && node tools/buildspec/gate.mjs --spec docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd --code /tmp/flowmap-extracted.mmd
scripts.flowmap:drift: npm run flowmap:bundle && node tools/flowmap/validate.mjs docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd && node tools/flowmap/flowmap-lint.mjs docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd && npm run flowmap:coverage && npm run flowmap:exports && npm run flowmap:gate && npm run flowmap:edges
scripts.flowmap:bodies: node tools/buildspec/extract.mjs --map docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd --tsconfig tsconfig.json --out /tmp/extracted.mmd && cp /tmp/extracted.bodies.json public/bodies.json
scripts.flowmap:ship: npm run flowmap:bundle && node tools/flowmap/validate.mjs docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd && node tools/flowmap/flowmap-lint.mjs docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd && npm run flowmap:coverage && npm run flowmap:exports && npm run flowmap:gate && npm run flowmap:edges && npm run flowmap:bodies && echo 'DONE: map is grammar-valid + structurally sound (lint pass), file-complete (coverage) + symbol-complete (exports) + in sync with code (gate) + edges code-backed-or-audited (edge-verify), and bodies.json regenerated from real source.'
scripts.spec:test:all: node --test tools/buildspec/pipeline.test.mjs tools/buildspec/parser-conformance.test.mjs tools/buildspec/slice-core.test.mjs tools/buildspec/writeback.test.mjs tools/buildspec/plan-layout.test.mjs tools/buildspec/plan-from-diff.test.mjs tools/buildspec/acceptance.test.mjs tools/flowmap/plan-cert.test.mjs tools/flowmap/flowmap-lint.test.mjs tools/flowmap/flowmap-lint.discriminate.test.mjs tools/buildspec/normtype.test.mjs tools/flowmap/edge-verify.test.mjs tools/flowmap/plan-check.test.mjs tools/flowmap/approve-export.test.mjs tools/flowmap/loop-e2e.test.mjs tools/flowmap/canonical.test.mjs tools/flowmap/contract.test.mjs tools/flowmap/verify-change.test.mjs tools/flowmap/replay.test.mjs tools/flowmap/contract-gate.test.mjs tools/flowmap/waves.test.mjs tools/flowmap/handoff-fresh.test.mjs tools/flowmap/orchestrate.test.mjs tools/flowmap/tooling-map.test.mjs tools/flowmap/roadmap.test.mjs tools/flowmap/quiz.test.mjs
scripts.flowmap:backfill: for f in $(find src -name '*.flowmap.mmd'); do node tools/buildspec/scaffold.mjs --backfill "$f" --tsconfig tsconfig.json; done
scripts.flowmap:tooling:verify: npm run flowmap:tooling:bundle && node tools/flowmap/validate.mjs docs/flowmap/_tooling.mmd && node tools/flowmap/flowmap-lint.mjs docs/flowmap/_tooling.mmd && node tools/flowmap/tooling-coverage.mjs && node --test tools/flowmap/tooling-map.test.mjs && echo 'DONE: tooling map bundled + grammar-valid + architectural (lint) + complete & symbol-true (tooling-coverage) + deterministic (test).'
scripts.flowmap:roadmap:audit: node tools/flowmap/roadmap.mjs --audit-doc CLAUDE.md && node tools/flowmap/roadmap.mjs --audit-tree docs --allow docs/flowmap/status-ban-allowlist.txt
scripts.flowmap:verify: npm run flowmap:bundle && node tools/flowmap/validate.mjs docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd && node tools/flowmap/flowmap-lint.mjs docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd && npm run flowmap:coverage && npm run flowmap:exports && npm run flowmap:gate && npm run flowmap:edges
